description: Canonical step names for delegationChain[] entries. The enum lives here, not in TS, so future iterations can extend it without code edits. Ordering is the canonical emit order: one entry per step per round when L2 is engaged; in BASIC mode only treasury-consultation is emitted (DECISIONS Q-iter4-A option (b)).

steps.description: Seller queries JupiterTreasuryAgent for ACTUS PAM cash/NPV/safety-threshold check at the proposed price
Seller queries InventoryProvider for stock availability + production-capacity signal
Seller queries LogisticsProvider for shipping cost + delivery-feasibility signal
Seller queries CreditProvider for buyer credit-rating + payment-risk signal
L2 executive reasoner aggregates advisor outputs + applies math-aggregator floor + produces the round decision
M2-beta router selects which advisors to consult for this mode + round, per the resolved seller-response-mode capabilities
